case_title: KHIKMATULLA SAPAROV VS. LUIS CANDELARIO CRUZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCAN DOCUMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY CO., INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $108.90) SERVED JUL-01-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY CO., INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $108.90) SERVED AUG-19-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CANDELARIO CRUZ, LUIS
TRIAL BRIEF FILED BY DEFENDANT CANDELARIO CRUZ, LUIS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAPAROV, KHIKMATULLA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY CO., INC. $5,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $183.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,433.90, LOSS OF WAGES -21 DAYS X $250 PER DAY. CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT LUIS CANDELARIO CRUZ IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-08-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-08-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF KHIKMATULLA SAPROV IS PRESENT, FRIEND KHASAN MIMATKHANOV APPEARED TO ASSIST WITH THE LANGUAGE OF UZBEK NORTHERN. DEFENDANT LUIS CANDELARIO CRUZ PRESENT AND DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS NAMED DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT BIRITE RESTURANT SUPPLY CO. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NATHAN BARVLICH (COO). PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-08-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-08-2021 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY CO., INC.
REQUEST FOR INTERPRETER -UZBEK REQUESTED FOR PLANTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAPAROV, KHIKMATULLA AS TO DEFENDANT CANDELARIO CRUZ, LUIS

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SAPAROV, KHIKMATULLA AS TO DEFENDANT CANDELARIO CRUZ, LUIS BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY CO., INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL BRIEF FILED BY DEFENDANT BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY CO., INC.
